scripts.test:isolated: for f in $(find src -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.build:ui: cd packages/ui && bun install && bun run build
scripts.build:embed: bun run scripts/embed-ui.ts && bun run build:extension && bun run scripts/embed-cli.ts
scripts.build:server: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun --outfile dist/clawd
scripts.build:server:linux-x64: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:linux-x64
scripts.build:server:linux-arm64: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:linux-arm64
scripts.build:server:darwin-arm64: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:darwin-arm64
scripts.build:server:darwin-x64: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:darwin-x64
scripts.build:server:windows-x64: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:windows-x64
scripts.build:server:all: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp dist && bun run build:embed && bun run compile:linux-x64 && bun run compile:linux-arm64 && bun run compile:darwin-arm64 && bun run compile:darwin-x64 && bun run compile:windows-x64
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server
scripts.build:all: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server:all
scripts.build:linux: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server:linux-x64
scripts.build:macos: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server:darwin-arm64
scripts.install:local: bun run clean && bun install && bun run build && bun run scripts/build-helper.ts mkdirp ~/.clawd/bin && bun run scripts/build-helper.ts cp dist/clawd ~/.clawd/bin/clawd
scripts.clean: bun run scripts/build-helper.ts rmrf dist release node_modules packages/ui/node_modules packages/ui/dist src/embedded-ui.ts
